name: Yankee French Toast
recipeIngredient: A few grates of Fresh Nutmeg
8 slices of Cinnamon Raisin bread - preferably a few days old
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs in a bowl, then add milk, rum (if using), sugar, salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
2. Place bread on a jelly roll pan.
3. Pour the mixture over the slices and let stand for 30 minutes or so, preferably refrigerated.
4. Melt 2-3 tablespoons of butter in a large skillet.
5. Fry the soaked bread until golden brown on one side.
6. Turn and fry the other side until golden brown as well.
7. Make syrup by mixing half a cup of maple syrup with a quarter cup of rum.
